title: Tv documentary to air about the last 4 years of Anno and production of shin eva
display_title: Tv documentary to air about the last 4 years of Anno and production of shin eva
wikitext:
[]: Tv documentary to air about the last 4 years of Anno and production of shin eva             Quote Post by Thesufferingpumpkin » Fri Mar 12, 2021 4:01 am Would be great if someone could record this and subtitle it. Looks like it will look at the last 4 years of production of shin Eva. SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Tv documentary to air about the last 4 years of Anno and production of shin eva             Quote Post by Pluto » Fri Mar 12, 2021 4:28 am Wow definitely looking forward to it. I know NHK has a live streaming site. If one were to use a VPN, they would be able to stream it live

[]: Re: Tv documentary to air about the last 4 years of Anno and production of shin eva             Quote Post by Thesufferingpumpkin » Fri Mar 12, 2021 4:38 am Pluto wrote: Wow definitely looking forward to it. I know NHK has a live streaming site. If one were to use a VPN, they would be able to stream it live

[]: Re: Tv documentary to air about the last 4 years of Anno and production of shin eva             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Fri Mar 12, 2021 6:53 am This sounds exciting indeed.

[]: Re: Tv documentary to air about the last 4 years of Anno and production of shin eva             Quote Post by Tajai » Fri Mar 12, 2021 9:34 am SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Tv documentary to air about the last 4 years of Anno and production of shin eva             Quote Post by Thesufferingpumpkin » Fri Mar 12, 2021 9:45 am I loved the kingdom of dreams and madness so I am looking forward to seeing this one It’s never been done before either in khara’s history allowing the making of evangelion to be documented so closely along with Anno

[]: Re: Tv documentary to air about the last 4 years of Anno and production of shin eva             Quote Post by hui43210 » Fri Mar 12, 2021 10:37 am This is exactly what I was hoping for based on all the behind the scenes twitter posts over the past four years! It just happens to be coming a lot sooner than I expected! NHK often subs these documentaries for their international site, I watched their Gundam documentary for example, I wouldn't be surprised if they gave this the same treatment eventually. Probably will have to rely on fansubbs in the short term however.

[]: Re: Tv documentary to air about the last 4 years of Anno and production of shin eva             Quote Post by cyharding » Fri Mar 12, 2021 10:48 am ^That's true. I remember last year, NHK put up their "10 years with Hayao Miyazaki" docuseries on their site for a time. I hope it comes included with a physical release of 3.0+1.0.

[]: Re: Tv documentary to air about the last 4 years of Anno and production of shin eva             Quote Post by Jayfive » Fri Mar 12, 2021 11:03 am Even in those pics you can see he's enjoying his craft again. Happy Anno is Best Anno.

[]: Re: Tv documentary to air about the last 4 years of Anno and production of shin eva             Quote Post by Thesufferingpumpkin » Fri Mar 12, 2021 11:34 am Can someone contact Anno cinema about this? So he can do a crowdfund to sub it so he gets a fee from it?

[]: Re: Tv documentary to air about the last 4 years of Anno and production of shin eva             Quote Post by hui43210 » Fri Mar 12, 2021 12:11 pm Thesufferingpumpkin wrote: Can someone contact Anno cinema about this? So he can do a crowdfund to sub it so he gets a fee from it?

[]: Re: Tv documentary to air about the last 4 years of Anno and production of shin eva             Quote Post by Thesufferingpumpkin » Fri Mar 12, 2021 1:09 pm Just got tweeted by annocinema he is currently trying to find a way to actually get the documentary so if anyone has the intention of recording it when it airs please let him know. Then he can set up a crowdfund link for subs

[]: Re: Tv documentary to air about the last 4 years of Anno and production of shin eva             Quote Post by kuro hazama » Sat Mar 13, 2021 9:35 am Thesufferingpumpkin wrote: Just got tweeted by annocinema he is currently trying to find a way to actually get the documentary so if anyone has the intention of recording it when it airs please let him know. Then he can set up a crowdfund link for subs

[]: Re: Tv documentary to air about the last 4 years of Anno and production of shin eva             Quote Post by Thesufferingpumpkin » Sat Mar 13, 2021 9:39 am Thank you. Can you drop Anno cinema a line and he can sort subtitles for it.

[]: Re: Tv documentary to air about the last 4 years of Anno and production of shin eva             Quote Post by Tajai » Tue Mar 16, 2021 6:27 pm tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com')) New teaser. Can't wait to see it

[]: Re: Tv documentary to air about the last 4 years of Anno and production of shin eva             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Tue Mar 16, 2021 7:07 pm If this streams on NKH World, subtitling might already be done for us....

[]: Re: Tv documentary to air about the last 4 years of Anno and production of shin eva             Quote Post by cyharding » Tue Mar 16, 2021 7:42 pm ^And they stream programming on their website, so we all might be able to see it.

[]: Re: Tv documentary to air about the last 4 years of Anno and production of shin eva             Quote Post by Thesufferingpumpkin » Tue Mar 16, 2021 9:34 pm It looks like he put so much into shin eva from this teaser. I checked the schedule it doesn’t appear to be showing on NHK world It’s going to be NHK - General From crunchy roll The 75-minute Professional Work Style special will air on NHK General TV in Japan on March 22. Beyond Anno, there will be appearances by his wife, mangaka Moyoco Anno, as well as Ghibli producer Toshio Suzuki, director and Anno protégé Kazuya Tsurumaki, Shin Godzilla and Shin Ultraman collaborator Shinji Higuchi, and anime legend Hayao Miyazaki.

[]: Re: Tv documentary to air about the last 4 years of Anno and production of shin eva             Quote Post by girlifyoudidnt » Sun Mar 21, 2021 11:15 am New promo, now with some others' appearances. SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Tv documentary to air about the last 4 years of Anno and production of shin eva             Quote Post by Tajai » Sun Mar 21, 2021 11:46 am girlifyoudidnt wrote: New promo, now with some others' appearances.
